form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start 3rd of 8 at Southwell All Weather on April 5 over 1600m, 2.25 len behind American State with 61kg at $4.20. Before that 3rd in a small field at Kempton Park All Weather on February 25 over 1400m, 2 len behind Ablon carrying 56.5kg at $2.30. Progressing nicely and is sure to prove tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign fifth of 14 at Newmarket (Rowley) October 31 over 1800m, 8 len behind Phone Tag with 61kg at $3. First up last campaign fourth of 9 at Kempton Park All Weather May 7 over 2400m, 10 len behind Jane Temple carrying 56kg at $51. Great chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Resumes after a break of five-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. First up last campaign fourth of 9 at Kempton Park All Weather May 7 over 2400m, 10 len behind Jane Temple carrying 56kg at $51. Great chance.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of seven months. Finished off last campaign second of 11 at Thirsk September 15 over 1600m, soft track; 2 len behind Day Of Grace carrying 61.5kg at $5.50. Previously first up; second last of 11 at this track April 16 over 1700m, 17 len behind Two B Tanned with 61kg at $8.50. Bold performance expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of seven months. Finished off last campaign second of 11 at Thirsk September 15 over 1600m, soft track; 2 len behind Day Of Grace carrying 61.5kg at $5.50. Previously first up; second last of 11 at this track April 16 over 1700m, 17 len behind Two B Tanned with 61kg at $8.50. Bold performance expected.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation second last of 12 at Newcastle All Weather December 16 over 1400m, 12 len behind Flowstate with 61kg at $8. First up last campaign second last of 11 at Southwell All Weather March 14 2025 over 1400m, 10 len behind King Of York with 61kg at $41. Major upset if she won.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Back from a spell. First up last campaign second last of 11 at Southwell All Weather March 14 2025 over 1400m, 10 len behind King Of York with 61kg at $41. Major upset if she won.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months 9th of 12 at Pontefract on April 7 over 2400m, 9 len behind Lightening Company carrying 59kg at $13. Previously second-up 3rd in a small field at this track on May 24 over 2010m, 4 len behind Dawn Of Liberation carrying 61kg at $3. Fitter but needs to turn the form around.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last campaign second last in a small field at Southwell All Weather September 23 over 1600m, 5 len behind Celestias Comet with 58kg at $126. On debut second last of 16 at Doncaster June 6 over 1600m, 24 len behind King's Charter carrying 56.5kg at $101. Doubt she will trouble these.

formComments.title: TAB

On debut second last of 16 at Doncaster June 6 over 1600m, 24 len behind King's Charter carrying 56.5kg at $101. Doubt she will trouble these.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation ninth of 11 at Chelmsford November 6 over 2000m, 18 len behind Renesmee carrying 62kg at $4. When resuming last campaign sixth of 16 at Epsom Downs June 7 over 1000m, 2.25 len behind Stormy Impact carrying 52.5kg at $21. Can run a good race despite the gap between runs.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up 6th of 9 at Wolverhampton on March 20 over 1700m, 4 len behind Eagle Day carrying 58.5kg at $19. Second-up 7th of 14 at Doncaster on March 28 over 2000m, 5 len behind Dancing Tiger carrying 60kg at $19. Cannot be left out of calculations.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign seventh of 9 at Pontefract September 18 over 2000m, 8 len behind Sweet Kiss carrying 58.5kg at $3.30. Previously first up; fourth of 8 at Doncaster May 3 over 2000m, 1.3 len behind Frostmagic with 56kg at $12. Expect a forward showing.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign ninth of 12 at Redcar October 27 over 2000m, 11 len behind Young Fire carrying 61kg at $17. Previously first up; ran last of 11 at this track April 16 over 1700m, 17 len behind Two B Tanned with 60kg at $51. Others make more appeal.
